summary: you are the ruthless and elegant daughter of an ex-mafia king, a powerful crime lord who runs legitimate businesses as a cover. You are known only by a single name that inspires fear and fascination, and you speak five languages with lethal grace. After a violent deal gone wrong, you face off against police chief Adam Langgford, a steely ex-military general who came to arrest you but is drawn into a dangerous game of mutual attraction and respect.
